entities.name: Integrity Gap
entities.context: Framework identifying how hidden personal collapse (vices, clutter, avoidance) creates leadership risk that eventually sabotages teams and companies

entities.name: Scaling Risk
entities.context: Category of risk that emerges when personal foundations are misaligned with leadership ambitions

entities.name: Personal Foundations
entities.context: Domain covering the personal prerequisites (substance use, environment, hard conversations) needed before scaling leadership

relationships.context: Integrity gap is identified as a specific type of scaling risk
Integrity gap belongs to the personal-foundations domain as a core principle
